channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fossil captures final moments of a T. rex attack on a dinosaur
item.description: A fossilized Edmontosaurus skull with a Tyrannosaurus tooth still embedded in its face provides rare evidence of a dramatic predator-prey encounter.

item.title: Scientists scan exoplanet K2-18b for alien signals
item.description: K2-18b, a promising world in the search for extraterrestrial life, was recently scanned by astronomers using an unusually powerful radio survey.

item.title: NASA selects four new Moon missions to build a permanent lunar base
item.description: NASA is advancing its lunar goals by funding four commercial Moon landings with nearly $600 million, set for late 2028. Each mission will carry...

item.title: Popular weight-loss drugs Ozempic and Wegovy may slow biological aging
item.description: A study found that semaglutide, the active ingredient in Ozempic and Wegovy, slowed biological aging markers in adults with HIV, marking the first...
